title: Restore shipcheck baseline reliability
description: Fix root quality-gate reproducibility by routing Prisma imports through @illuvrse/db and normalizing the root test reporter path used by the audit commands.
impact: Unblocks lint, root test execution, and shipcheck:quick from a clean audit path.
proposed_changes: Update direct Prisma type imports in apps/web to use @illuvrse/db
Add scripts/run-root-test.mjs and route root test through it

title: Enforce production auth gating
description: Block ALLOW_DEV_CREDENTIALS_AUTH from being enabled in production and make the root env template default safe.
impact: Closes a production auth bypass path.
commands_to_reproduce: NODE_ENV=production NEXTAUTH_URL=https://illuvrse.example NEXTAUTH_SECRET=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 ALLOW_DEV_CREDENTIALS_AUTH=true pnpm --filter @illuvrse/web exec vitest run --config tests/vitest.config.ts tests/unit/auth-config.test.ts
proposed_changes: Throw from assertAuthSecurityConfig when ALLOW_DEV_CREDENTIALS_AUTH=true in production
Add unit coverage for reject and accept paths

title: Repair lockfile truth for frozen installs
description: Refresh the root lockfile so pnpm install --frozen-lockfile succeeds against current workspace manifests.
impact: Restores deterministic bootstrap and CI parity.
proposed_changes: Verify packages/media-corp-agents/package.json is fully reflected in the lockfile

title: Tighten migration safety workflow
description: Move beyond inline destructive markers by requiring explicit non-dev approval artifacts while keeping migration policy docs accurate.
impact: Reduces destructive migration risk in promoted environments.
proposed_changes: Add stricter destructive migration approval workflow
tests_to_add: Reject destructive path without approval artifact
Accept destructive path with explicit approval artifact

title: Expand telemetry and SLO coverage for watch/live/party
description: Add typed persisted telemetry for watch, live, and party/voice flows so Phase 15 can evaluate the minimum SLO set needed for production.
impact: Makes production health measurable across core entertainment flows.
proposed_changes: Extend telemetry schemas with watch/live/party events
Bind them to ops/governance/slos.json and admin summary surfaces

title: Make security scans runnable in local and CI flows
description: Provision or document gitleaks and trivy so repo audits fail on findings, not on missing scanner binaries.
impact: Raises the floor on secrets and filesystem vulnerability detection.
proposed_changes: Add documented install path or wrappers for gitleaks and trivy
Wire scanners into CI artifact outputs

title: Extend release gates to satellite products
description: Promote GameGrid and selected satellite apps into the root promotion path so the monorepo is tested as shipped, not only as the web shell.
impact: Improves confidence that platform releases reflect the real monorepo footprint.
proposed_changes: Add platform-wide build and test scripts with verified workspace filters

title: Add CODEOWNERS-backed backlog routing
description: Add repo ownership metadata so automated issue/PR routing does not fall back to a single default reviewer for every task.
impact: Improves review quality and task routing across the monorepo.
proposed_changes: Map apps/web, apps/gamegrid, packages/db, packages/storage, and ops ownership
tests_to_add: Ownership lint or manual review routing check
